DiscoverStreamArtistsMarketplace

Authentication

Wallet sign-in now belongs to the server boundary.

The client only coordinates the flow. SEP-10 challenge creation, verification, and session issuance now live in the standalone backend.

Stellar wallet authentication

The new auth path is server-backed. The wallet provides identity proof, then the Node server issues the session used by the rest of the product.

Current status

No session yet. Connect a wallet to start the SEP-10 flow.
